description.value:
Type: Wand  |  Rarity: Uncommon  |  Primary Energy: Earth  |  Weight: 1  |  Charges: 5/5 (recharge: 1d8/2 at Long Rest)

This wand has 5 charges. As an action the wielder may expend a charge, causing tall grass, weeds, and other plants to grow and wrap around creatures in the area of effect or those that enter the area. This functions identically to the weave Grasping Vines.

The wand regains 1d8/2 (rounded normally) charges after a long rest. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d8 — on an 8, the wand crumbles into ash and is destroyed.

Granted Weaves

WeaveCharge Cost
Grasping Vines1

system.notes: If the last charge is expended, roll 1d8; on a result of 8 the wand is destroyed.
